title: Beyth #1035
definition:
Beth-lehem = "house of bread (food)"

 1) a city in Judah, birthplace of David
 2) a place in Zebulun
nasbUsage:
Definition: Beth-lehem = "house of bread (food)"

 1) a city in Judah, birthplace of David
 2) a place in Zebulun

    NASB:  place of bread, a city in Judah, also a city in Zebulun
